item.title: Linux 基金会成立 x402 基金会，拥有 40 名成员，以标准化代理付款
item.summary: The Linux Foundation has launched the x402 Foundation with 40 founding members — including Visa, Mastercard, Stripe, AWS, Google, Coinbase, and Casper Network — to develop an open payment standard enabling AI agents to transact autonomously over HTTP.
